title: adesmia kingii
intro: Adesmia kingii, also known as Queñoa, is a type of plant native to the Andean region in South America, belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the kidneys and urinary tract, making it a traditional treatment for kidney stones and urinary infections. The health benefits of Adesmia kingii include its diuretic properties, which help to flush out toxins from the body, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve blood circulation. In herbal preparations, Adesmia kingii is often combined with other medicinal plants to create teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be consumed to alleviate various health issues.
